scripts.check: pnpm run docs:check && pnpm run spellcheck && pnpm run docs:refs && pnpm run docs:links && pnpm run config:check && pnpm run specs:check && pnpm run -r typecheck && pnpm run -r test && pnpm run rust:check
scripts.api:test: docker compose stop web api worker && docker compose up -d --wait postgres object-storage mailpit && docker compose run --rm object-storage-init && docker compose exec -T postgres dropdb --if-exists --force -U shareslices shareslices_test && docker compose exec -T postgres createdb -U shareslices shareslices_test && DATABASE_URL=postgres://shareslices:shareslices@127.0.0.1:5432/shareslices_test node --env-file=.env.example --env-file-if-exists=.env api/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs api/src/db/migrate.ts && DATABASE_URL=postgres://shareslices:shareslices@127.0.0.1:5432/shareslices_test pnpm --dir api run test && uv run pytest api/tests/test_account_entry_contract.py
scripts.rust:check: pnpm run rust:fmt && pnpm run rust:clippy && pnpm run rust:test
